subcodes.first_line: O my Ha'i! For some time no breeze from Thy paradise hath reached mine ear, nor hath any fragrance wafted from the garden of Thy love [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای هائی من چندیست که از هاای هوای بگوش نرسیده و از گلزار محبتش بوای نیامده
subcodes.subjects: @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @loving one's enemies; returning hatred with love, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @power of prayer, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @courtesy; culture [adab], @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering
